phase: MVP Enhancement: Prompt Harvesting & Demo Gallery
summary: Extended PI Agent Design School with real prompt extraction from Seedance2Prompt, demo media generation, showcase gallery, and enhanced agent-readable APIs. Prompt harvesting pipeline with category-to-track mapping, deduplication, and database integration. Visual showcase page with Synthia-designed components. All APIs now surface demonstration media for agent discovery.

components: packages/legacy-ingestor/crawler.ts — Polite rate-limited crawler (1 req/sec) with listing→detail extraction, pagination, exponential backoff
packages/legacy-ingestor/seedance-parser.ts — Category-to-track mapping and structured field extraction (shotType, cameraMotion, mood, lighting)
packages/legacy-ingestor/db-writer.ts — PostgreSQL insertion with deduplication by content hash, media reference management
packages/legacy-ingestor/cli.ts — Orchestrated pipeline: crawl → parse → deduplicate → export + optional DB write
capabilities: Crawl Seedance2Prompt listing pages with pagination
Extract detail URLs from listing markup
Parse prompt HTML and extract title, body, categories, tags, images, videos
Map categories to track enum (Documentary → documentary, Anime → anime, etc)
Extract structured fields from prompt body (shot type, camera motion, mood, lighting)
Deduplicate by content hash and source URL
Write to PostgreSQL with category and tag management
Dry-run mode for testing without DB writes
Configurable max pages, polite rate limiting

components: packages/legacy-ingestor/demo-generator.ts — Generates SVG placeholder images for each track
db/schema/prompts.ts — Added demo_image_url and demo_video_url columns
app/components/demo-showcase.tsx — Reusable React component with Synthia styling
task_b_demo_media.design_system: Synthia SuperDesign: dark theme (slate-950/900), blue/purple accents, premium typography (font-bold, text-xl), responsive grid, smooth hover effects

endpoints_enhanced: GET /api/prompts — Now includes demo_image_url and demo_video_url per prompt, mapped by track
GET /api/catalog — Track objects include demo URLs, showcase_url, added /api/demos to machine_readable_endpoints
GET /api/demos (NEW) — Dedicated endpoint for discovering track demonstrations (supports ?track= filter, ?format=jsonl)
documentation_updated: app/llms.txt/route.ts — Added 'Demo & Showcase' section with field descriptions and usage examples
app/agents.json/route.ts — Added 'demo-gallery' capability, demo_image_url to track objects, demos/showcase URLs to discovery
agent_capabilities_added: JSONL export support for bulk demo discovery

task_d_openapi_updates.notes: Integrated into Task C — OpenAPI schema includes demo fields in agents.json manifest, /api/catalog exposes demo discovery

guidelines_followed: Synthia design system: white-space elegance, premium typography, calm visual hierarchy
Dark theme with blue/purple accents (gradient overlays, hover effects)
Responsive grid layouts (1/2/3 columns on mobile/tablet/desktop)
Accessibility: alt text on images, semantic HTML, proper color contrast
Component quality: UDEC-grade clarity, performance optimization (lazy loading where appropriate)

test_coverage: Crawler: URL extraction, pagination, visited tracking, polite delay
Seedance Parser: Category-to-track mapping for all 6 tracks, structured field extraction
Database: Insert/duplicate detection, tag and media reference management
JSONL Export: Line validation, complete object preservation
Demo API: Data structure validation, filtering, JSONL format
safety_measures: No secrets in code (all URLs hardcoded as safe public paths)
Placeholder media only (no real copyrighted content, SVG generation)
Mocked HTTP in tests (no real crawling during test runs)
JSONL export for manual verification before DB insert
Dry-run mode prevents accidental DB writes

deliverables: ✓ Code: 11 new files for ingestor, 6 demo SVGs, 2 new page components, 4 new API/doc endpoints
~ Build Report: Updated with feature completion details (this file)
~ Architecture Doc: To be generated summarizing demo media pipeline

files_modified_this_phase: app/agents.json/route.ts (added demo capability and track URLs)

human_facing: GET /showcase — Demo gallery with descriptions, CTAs, API docs
GET / → updated home page (pending navigation link to /showcase)
agent_readable: GET /api/prompts — All prompts with demo_image_url / demo_video_url
GET /agents.json — Updated manifest with demo capability

prompts_table_additions: demo_image_url TEXT — URL to demonstration image asset
demo_video_url TEXT — URL to demonstration video asset
indexes_added: idx_prompts_demo_image_url — Efficient WHERE demo_image_url IS NOT NULL
idx_prompts_demo_video_url — Efficient WHERE demo_video_url IS NOT NULL

migration_status.drizzle_kit_pending: Automatic migration generation deferred pending live DATABASE_URL connection

next_steps: Run `npm run ingest:dry-run` to test prompt extraction pipeline against Seedance2Prompt
Review JSONL export at data/seedance_prompts.jsonl before live DB ingest
Adjust prompt categories and track mappings based on real data
Generate real demo media or update SVG placeholders with custom designs
Create additional showcase content (testimonials, use cases, case studies)
Link /showcase from home page and track listing pages
known_limitations: Demo media: SVG placeholders only (real images/videos can be substituted by updating public/demos/images/ URLs)
Prompt ingestor: Dry-run mode only until DATABASE_URL is configured
Category mapping: Hardcoded in seedance-parser.ts (can be made configurable via config file)
